title: 7 herbal creams for men with low sperm count to improve fertility
description: Lepidium meyenii creams, also known as Maca root cream, have been traditionally used to help with fertility issues, particularly low sperm count. The cream contains bioactive compounds like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are believed to stimulate the production of testosterone and improve sperm quality.
